title: Malaysia working to ensure energy supply security until December, says Fadillah
description: PUTRAJAYA: The government is working to ensure the country's energy supply security can be extended until December amid the global supply crisis that has disrupted economic chains and increased energy costs, said Deputy Prime Minister Datuk Seri Fadillah Yusof.

title: Global crisis spurs efforts to reinforce country's economic structure, says Akmal Nasrullah
description: PUTRAJAYA: The government views the current global crisis as an impetus to strengthen the country's economic structure, including a greater focus on high-value industries, the energy transition and a more inclusive approach to delivering public assistance.

title: Congress Leader Rahul Gandhi Targets BJP, RSS, Warns Of ‘Economic Storm’
description: Congress leader Rahul Gandhi on Wednesday accused the BJP, RSS and PM Narendra Modi of weakening the Constitution and pushing India towards an economic crisis during rallies in Rae Bareli and Amethi. Gandhi also mocked Modi’s appearances with Italian PM Giorgia Meloni and alleged the government was ignoring farmers while favouring select industrialists. BJP leaders sharply criticised his remarks.

title: Why your next pack of condoms may cost more amid global oil shock

title: Rising Diesel Prices And Fuel Shortages Threaten Truck Movement Across India, Transport Sector Warns Of Supply Chain Disruption
